title: ReinforcementRegion
description: ReinforcementRegion: A region defining the area of a Panel to be reinforced. The curve must exist within the 2D region outlined by ExternalEdges of the Panel.

Orientation.description: Local x, y, and z axes of the region as a vector Basis. Defaults to OrientationAngle and Plane of Panel if null or empty. Basis: An ordered set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors defining three-dimensional orientation in space

Perimeter.description: A 2D curve defining the external boundaries of the region to be reinforced. The curve must exist within the ExternalEdges of the Panel. Defaultsto the Panel perimeter if null or empty. ICurve: The interface for all one-dimensional geometrical objects.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
